backend/main.mo: Entry point for the ICP backend actor that includes blob storage functionality via a MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing requirements to replace incorrect Chinese food images in menu item cards 1, 3, 4, and 5 with the correct Mexican food images from version 9, all pointing to MenuSection.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a human-readable changelog/index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering section component displaying event offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a scroll-to-contact CTA for the Phoenix metro area.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying owner Jasmine Cota's info card with a clickable phone number, service area, and availability details.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info for Jasmine Cota, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a logo, tagline, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu that hides on scroll-down and reappears on scroll-up.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, title, tagline, and CTA buttons to explore the menu or book catering via phone.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (tacos, burritos, quesadillas, etc.) with images, descriptions, ingredient details, and optional choice selectors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, exported as an empty object for a static frontend site.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down/none), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with a Mexican-inspired warm color palette, custom CSS variables for light and dark modes, and utility classes for typography and decorative effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for a Mexican restaurant frontend, extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, chili, sienna, verde, cream), custom font families (Playfair Display, Dancing Script, Montserrat), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of a Mexican restaurant website project, specifically documenting a fix request to replace incorrect Chinese food images with authentic Mexican food images across five menu item cards and a catering banner, restoring the appearance from live website version 9.
